entry.summary: Order

entry.title: Entry #713 in Kadrey v. Meta Platforms, Inc., 3:23-cv-03417
entry.summary: ADDITIONAL ORDER RE SEALING.The plaintiffs are also ordered to refile unredacted versions of the filings at Dkt. Nos. 690, 687, and 673, including attachments. These filings are due 7 days from the date of this Order. Signed by Judge Vince Chhabria on 4/13/26. (This is a text-only entry generated by the court. There is no document associated with this entry.) (vclc2, COURT STAFF) (Filed on 4/13/2026) (Entered: 04/13/2026)

entry.title: Entry #711 in Kadrey v. Meta Platforms, Inc., 3:23-cv-03417
entry.summary: CLERK'S NOTICE SCHEDULING FURTHER CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE. Joint Case Management Statement due by 4/24/2026. Further Case Management Conference set for 5/1/2026 at 10:00 AM by Videoconference Only. This proceeding will be held via a Zoom webinar.Webinar Access: All counsel, members of the public, and media may access the webinar information at https://www.cand.uscourts.gov/vc Court Appearances: Advanced notice is required of counsel or parties who wish to be identified by the court as making an appearance or will be participating in the argument at the hearing. One list of names of all counsel appearing for all parties must be sent in one email to the CRD at vccrd@cand.uscourts.gov no later than Friday, April 24, 2026, by no later than 12:00PM.Civ LR 77-3(d). Persons granted access to court proceedings held by telephone or videoconference are reminded that photographing, recording, and rebroadcasting of court proceedings, including screenshots or other visual copying of a hearing, is absolutely prohibited.Zoom Guidance and Setup: https://cand.uscourts.gov/judges/remote-access-court-proceedings/participating-court-proceedings-zoo. (This is a text-only entry generated by the court. There is no document associated with this entry.)(bxs, COURT STAFF) (Filed on 4/10/2026) (Entered: 04/10/2026)

entry.title: Entry #709 in Kadrey v. Meta Platforms, Inc., 3:23-cv-03417
entry.summary: ORDER. The sealing requests summarized at Dkt. No. 708-1 are granted. The plaintiffs are ordered to refile publicly Stein Declaration Ex. 5, which was originally filed under seal (see Dkt. Nos. 658-7 and 659-7) but which Meta does not seek to seal. Signed by Judge Vince Chhabria on 4/10/26. (This is a text-only entry generated by the court. There is no document associated with this entry.) (vclc2, COURT STAFF) (Filed on 4/10/2026) (Entered: 04/10/2026)

There is no document associated with this entry.) (vclc2, COURT STAFF) (Filed on 4/1/2026) (Entered: 04/01/2026)

entry.title: Minute entry from 2026-03-26 in Kadrey v. Meta Platforms, Inc., 3:23-cv-03417
entry.summary: Set Deadlines/Hearings

entry.title: Minute entry from 2026-03-26 in Kadrey v. Meta Platforms, Inc., 3:23-cv-03417
entry.summary: Set Deadlines/Hearings: Opening Reports due by 9/18/2026. Rebuttal Reports due by 10/16/2026. Reply Expert Reports due by 10/30/2026. Close of Expert Discovery due by 11/20/2026. Deadline for Summary Judgment Brief 1 (Plaintiffs Opening Brief) due by 12/11/2026. Deadline for Summary Judgment Brief 2 (Defendants Opening Brief & Opposition) due by 1/11/2027. Deadline for Summary Judgment Brief 3 (Plaintiffs Opposition & Reply) due by 1/29/2027. Deadline for Summary Judgment Brief 4 (Defendants Reply) due by 2/12/2027. Dispositive Motion Hearing set for 2/25/2027 at 10:00 AM in San Francisco, Courtroom 04, 17th Floor before Judge Vince Chhabria. (bxs, COURT STAFF) (Filed on 3/26/2026)
